---
title: "max_unpool_nd"
generated: true
description: "Scatter pooled values back into a higher-resolution grid."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.morphology.pooling`](../nitrix-morphology-pooling.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:max_unpool_nd -->
```python
max_unpool_nd(x: Num[Array, '*batch C *pooled'], indices: Int[Array, '*batch C *pooled'], *, output_shape: Sequence[int], spatial_rank: int) -> Num[Array, '*batch C *spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:max_unpool_nd -->
Scatter pooled values back into a higher-resolution grid.

For each `(batch, channel, output_position)`, write
`x[batch, channel, output_position]` into the source grid
at the flat index `indices[batch, channel, output_position]`;
all other positions get zero.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:max_unpool_nd -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `x` | `Num` | `*batch` × `C` × `*pooled` | — | Pooled values, `(..., C, *pooled_spatial)`. |
| `indices` | `Int` | `*batch` × `C` × `*pooled` | — | Flat indices (per-channel, in C-order over the unbatched spatial grid) as produced by [`max_pool_with_indices_nd`](../nitrix-morphology-pooling/max_pool_with_indices_nd.qmd). Same shape as `x`. |
| `output_shape` | `Sequence[int]` | — | — | Target spatial shape (length `spatial_rank`). Determines the resolution we're unpooling into. |
| `spatial_rank` | `int` | — | — | Number of trailing spatial axes. |

**Returns** `Num` — shape `*batch` × `C` × `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:max_unpool_nd -->
::: {.callout-note}
Implementation: build a flat `(batch, C, prod(output_shape))`
target buffer via `.at[..., indices].set(x)`, then reshape.
Differentiable via the standard scatter VJP; gradient flows
back to `x` but not `indices` (a discrete index map).
:::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:max_unpool_nd -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*batch` | leading batch axes (variadic) |
| `C` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `*pooled` | a variadic group of axes (`pooled`) |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
